description: Install vitest ^3 and @vitest/coverage-v8. Create vitest.config.ts with TypeScript support, coverage thresholds (statements 80%, branches 75%, functions 90%, lines 80%), and test fixture paths. Add test and test:watch scripts. Create tests/__fixtures__/ with sample custom-elements.json and tokens.json. See planning.md Section 12 for coverage targets per handler.
title: Setup Vitest unit and integration testing
